_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL
_id int NOT NULL

1. Company tạo RFP
2. Invite Vendor
3. Vendor submit Bid
4. Buyer chọn Bid (Finalize)
5. Sinh Contract
6. Ký hợp đồng

Company → RFP → RfpItem → RfpItemSpec
↓
     RfpBid → RfpBidItem → RfpBidItemSpec
↓
     RfpFinalize → Contract

App
- Company
+ POST /api/company (Request cho Super Admin)
+ ...
- Bid
Vendor
+ POST /api/rfp-bid
+ GET /api/rfp-bid/{id}


Admin
- Company
+ ...
- Employee
+ POST /api/employee
+ GET /api/employees
+ GET /api/employee{id}
+ PATCH /api/employee
+ ...
- RFP
+ POST /api/rfp
> Insert RFP
> Insert Items
> Insert Specs
+ GET /api/rfps
+ GET /api/rfp/{id}
+ GET /api/rfp/{rfpId}/bid
+ GET /api/rfp/{rfpId}/finalize
+ ...
- RFP Items
+ POST /api/rfp/{rfpId}/items (Optional)
+ PATCH /api/rfp-item/{id}
+ ...
- Vendor Participation
+ POST /api/rfp/{rfpId}/invite
+...
- Bid
Vendor
+ GET /api/rfp-bid/{id}
+ ...
- Finalize
+ POST /api/rfp-finalize
+ ...
- Contract
+ POST /api/contract/{id}/sign
+ GET /api/contract/{id}
+ ...
Buyer
+ POST /api/contract
+ ...
Vendor
+ POST /api/contract/{id}/decline
+ ...
